forkProtocol.trigger: Record only attack-family reactivations actually selected by the normal reactivation AI; check-return search plan steps are excluded.
forkProtocol.sampling: For games where both players have at least one recorded decision, sample one decision uniformly per player; unmatched games are excluded. This yields at most two matched decisions per base game.
forkProtocol.onWorld: Execute the exact selected choice 2/3 action, then resume normal AI.
forkProtocol.offWorld: At the same decision point, select one best alternative after excluding choice 2/3; execute it once, then resume normal AI. Summon or wait ends the current main phase.
forkProtocol.randomHandling: Clone state and PRNG at the decision point; ON and OFF resume from identical PRNG state.

strata.check: under_check when the opponent has a pending four-cell check; otherwise normal

assumptions.scoring: not used; no adoption judgement is made

variant.name: react_value_forked_v2_R1_v31_body
variant.purpose: Frozen v3.1 center: v3 body with heavy 2/3/3/3/3/4 reactivation and choice 2 rotate-attack rule.
